updates: Move bullet up/down changed to Ctrl+↑/↓ (same on Windows and Mac) — safest cross-platform arrow shortcut with no OS, browser, or Electron intercept.
Fixed blob "..." menu: Duplicate, Lock, Hide, Delete work; popup layer no longer blocks canvas (portal container pointer-events: none, menu pointer-events: auto).
Removed pages directory so build no longer fails with _document or pages-manifest errors; app is App Router only.
